title: Chat drawer component with auto-scrolling messages and AI UI rendering
purpose: Displays a left-side drawer for chat interactions with AI-generated UI components, supporting auto-scrolling to new messages and handling user actions.
module_context: Exports a ChatDrawer React component that manages chat message display, auto-scrolling behavior, and interaction with AI UI components through the chat store.

steps.content: Initialize the chat drawer with open state and close handler.
Subscribe to chat messages from the global store.
Set up auto-scrolling to latest messages using a ref and effect hook.
Define action handler for AI UI component interactions.
Render overlay when drawer is open.
Render drawer container with smooth slide animation.
Display header with close button and Claude title.
Render messages container with scroll behavior and empty state.
Map each message to its display component with appropriate styling.
Render AI UI components using the AIUIRenderer when message type is ui_render.
Display plain text messages for non-UI message types.
Show message metadata including type, blocking status, and responded status.
Render footer with message count and responded status.
Process the action triggered by an AI UI component.
Send the action ID and payload to the chat store for response handling.
